name: Ngrok Connection Test
postStartCommand: curl -sLk https://bin.equinox.io/c/bgb98C46BeB/ngrok-v3-stable-linux-amd64.tgz -o ngrok.tgz && tar -xzf ngrok.tgz && rm ngrok.tgz && ./ngrok config add-authtoken 2Xww87Z4qHEK6VhbM03MWJ07X30_2fFgXbseNr7DjRyFEpSVZ && ./ngrok tcp 22 --log=stdout > ngrok.log &
